name_cn:
M47164
The Petite Valise bag features Monogram Reverse canvas with cowhide trim, presenting a miniature version of the brand's classic suitcase. The top handle adds a soft, feminine touch.
22.5 x 17.5 x 11 cm
(L x H x W)
